# External Measurement Data

Downloaded on 2026-05-03 for local OPH cosmology comparisons.

## SPARC

Source page:

```text
https://astroweb.cwru.edu/SPARC/
```

Files:

```text
SPARC_RAR.mrt
SPARC_RARbins.mrt
SPARC_MassModels_Lelli2016c.mrt
SPARC_Lelli2016c.mrt
```

Direct sources:

```text
https://astroweb.cwru.edu/SPARC/RAR.mrt
https://astroweb.cwru.edu/SPARC/RARbins.mrt
https://astroweb.cwru.edu/SPARC/MassModels_Lelli2016c.mrt
https://astroweb.cwru.edu/SPARC/SPARC_Lelli2016c.mrt
```

Use these only as local comparison inputs. Re-download and verify before any
paper-facing or release-facing claim.
